rulings.Case Title: GARRITT BLANZ ET AL VS. ROBERT C HINCKLEY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Renewed Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 24, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFF GARRITT BLANZ, DAVID BLANZ Notice Of Renewed Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint continued to July 3, 2019. Parties are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of the opposition and reply to department 501 no later than June 25, 2019 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: LISA GAUTIER ET AL VS. EDWARD S. YEE MD ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Re: Contempt Of This Court'S March 6, 2019 Preliminary Injunction Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 24, 2019 line 2. Order To Show Cause Re: Contempt Of This Court'S March 6, 2019 Preliminary Injunction Order DENIED. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: SHAYLA SHAHAR VS. YING NGOR LEE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause For Preliminary Injunction And Temporary Restraining Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 24, 2019 line 3. Order To Show Cause For Preliminary Injunction And Temporary Restraining Order GRANTED as follows: (1) the landlord is enjoined from collecting future rent until a Certificate of Occupancy is obtained; (2) the landlord is enjoined form offering any units in the property for rent to new/prospective tenants unless the property is being offered for rent in accordance with the existing Certificate of Occupancy. The landlord is not precluded from addressing the tenancies by any means authorized by law, e.g. Salazar v. Maradeaga (2010) 10 Cal.App.4th Supp.1; SFRO 37.9(a)(10). = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ASIAN, INC. VS. SAUL FLORES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Petition, Petitoin For Relief From Forfeiture Due To Hardship; Proof Of Service
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 24, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT SAUL FLORES Notice Of Petition, Petitoin For Relief From Forfeiture Due To Hardship DENIED without prejudice. The motion is premature. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ARENDT HOUSE, L.P. VS. TAFT SHAFFER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 24, 2019 line 5. PLAINTIFF ARENDT HOUSE, L.P. Mtn For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation GRANTED. Plaintiff established breach of stipulation. No opposition filed. = (501/CFH)
